## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm run lint:style` pass
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage` passes, with tests added/updated for any behavior change
- [ ] `npm run build:only` and `npm run build:types` pass
- [ ] E2e tests added/updated (`e2e/`) for user-facing interaction changes
- [ ] Changelog updated (`vitepress-docs/guide/changelog.md`) if this is a breaking change or
      notable fix/feature
- [ ] No new eagerly-bundled layout imports (see [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md) - lazy
      loading must stay intact)
